name: replit-policy-guardrails
description: Enforce security and resource policies for Replit-hosted apps: secrets exposure prevention, resource limits, deployment visibility, and database access controls. Use when hardening a Replit app for production, auditing security posture, or setting up guardrails for team development. Trigger with phrases like "replit policy", "replit guardrails", "replit security audit", "replit hardening", "replit best practices check".
